title: wolftpm-src/build.rs: optional C sources silently skipped even when their feature is active
description: optional_sources (tpm2_linux.c, tpm2_swtpm.c, etc.) are compiled only if the file exists, with no feature-flag check. If WOLFTPM_SRC points to an older wolfTPM that lacks tpm2_linux.c but the linux-dev feature is enabled, the build silently compiles without that file. options.h will define WOLFTPM_LINUX_DEV but the C source providing the HAL implementation is absent. This produces a linker error (undefined TPM2_IoCb_Linux or similar) rather than a clear build-time error. Fix: when linux-dev feature is active, assert tpm2_linux.c exists; same for swtpm / tpm2_swtpm.c.
